name: Stage 1
ai: Always begins with Slash. Afterwards, has a 25% chance of using Soul Strike and a 75% chance of Slash, except Soul Strike cannot be used twice in a row and slash cannot be used three times in a row. Becomes "half dead" and uses Rebirth upon hitting 0 hp.

name: Stage 2
ai: Always begins with Dark Echo. Afterwards, has a 50% chance of using Sludge or Tackle, except neither can be used three times in a row.

name: Bronze Automaton
ai: Deterministic order. First, uses Spawn Orbs. Afterwards, cycles in the order of Flail -> Boost -> Flail -> Boost -> HYPER BEAM -> Stunned. In Ascension 19, uses Boost instead of Stunned.

name: Bronze Orb
notes: Stasis always steals a random card of the highest rarity in your draw pile (or discard pile, if the draw pile is empty).
ai: Has a 75% chance of using Stasis until it has been used. Otherwise, has a 70% chance of using Support Beam and 30% chance of using Beam, but cannot use the same move 3 times in a row.

name: The Champ
notes: Enrages when reaching below 50% hp (no indicator)
ai: Every 4 turns, uses Taunt. Otherwise, approximately (15/15/25/45) (30/0/25/45) probability split between (Defensive Stance/Gloat/Face Slap/Heavy Slash). No move can be used twice in a row, and Defensive Stance cannot be used more than 2 times, total (this applies to enraged too). When attempting to use an invalid move, will use the next move in the order of Defensive Stance -> Gloat -> Face Slap -> Heavy Slash -> Face Slap (instead of even probability distribution).

name: The Collector
ai: Always begins with Spawn. On turn 4, always uses the Mega Debuff. Otherwise, if a Torch Head is dead, has approximately a (25/45/30) probability split between (Revive/Fireball/Buff). If all Torch Heads are alive, the split becomes (70/30) between (Fireball/Buff). Cannot use Revive or Buff twice in a row, or Fireball three times in a row.

name: Corrupt Heart
ai: Always begins with Debilitate. Every 3 turns, starting from turn 4, uses Buff. Otherwise, has an equal chance of either using Blood Shots followed by Echo or Echo followed by Blood Shots.

name: Donu
ai: Always begins by using Circle of Power, and then alternates between its two moves.

name: Deca
ai: Always begins by using Beam, and then alternates between its two moves.

name: Hexaghost
ai: Always begins with Activate, then Divider. Afterwards, cycles in the order of Sear -> Tackle -> Sear -> Inflame -> Tackle -> Sear -> Inferno, with 0-6 orbs active, respectively.

name: Slime Boss
notes: Splits into a Spike Slime (L) and an Acid Slime (L) if HP is 50% or below
ai: Always cycles in the order of Goop Spray -> Preparing -> Slam.

name: Time Eater
ai: Always uses Haste once, immediately after reaching below 50% HP. Otherwise, approximately a (20/45/35) probability split between Ripple, Reverberate, and Head Slam, except Ripple and Head Slam cannot be used twice in a row, and Reverberate cannot be used three times in a row.
